commit_message: Fix serial_deglitch.sv Fix serial_deglitch.sv if we want to count zeros, then we should check if count_q != 0. Checking count_q!=SIZE will lead to stuck in 1 for q_o

examples.commit_message: Fix serial_deglitch.sv Fix serial_deglitch.sv if we want to count zeros, then we should check if count_q != 0. Checking count_q!=SIZE will lead to stuck in 1 for q_o
examples.patch:
@@ -32,7 +32,7 @@ module serial_deglitch #(
             if (en_i) begin
                 if (d_i == 1'b1 && count_q != SIZE[SIZE-1:0]) begin
                     count_q <= count_q + 1;
-                end else if (d_i == 1'b0 && count_q != SIZE[SIZE-1:0]) begin
+                end else if (d_i == 1'b0 && count_q != 0) begin
                     count_q <= count_q - 1;
                 end
             end
